summary: Junior Machine Learning Engineer with 3 years of experience in developing and deploying machine learning models. Skilled in Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, and Hugging Face Transformers. Experienced in building NLP and computer vision solutions. Active contributor to major open-source projects including TensorFlow, Transformers, and PyTorch. Holds a B.Sc. in Computer Engineering from Zewail City of Science and Technology. AWS Certified Machine Learning Specialist. Passionate about applied ML and MLOps.

work_experience.description: Developing and maintaining machine learning pipelines for automated bug triage and user behavior analytics. Built classification models to categorize issues and predict crash patterns. Worked with engineering teams to integrate models into production using Docker and AWS SageMaker.

Assisted in developing recommendation systems for doctor-patient matching using natural language processing. Fine-tuned BERT models on medical appointment data. Built data preprocessing pipelines and model evaluation dashboards.

Collaborated with the Azure ML team to build and deploy customer churn prediction models. Automated data ingestion and feature engineering pipelines. Gained hands-on experience with Azure ML Studio and MLOps workflows.
